---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a focused reader, converter, diagnostic, or workflow improvement
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Problem

What user workflow or failure mode should this improve?

## Proposed Behavior

Describe the command, output, or conversion behavior you expect.

## Scope

- Source type or command affected:
- Platform affected: macOS / Windows / both
- Requires private document payload changes: yes / no

## Safety Considerations

Explain whether this could expose cookies, tokens, private URLs, document content, or generated artifacts.

## Alternatives Considered

List any simpler workflow, documentation-only change, or workaround.
